hero.subtitle: We bridge the gap between African ambition and Belarusian excellence. Get admission to top-ranked universities with full support from application to graduation.

countries.title: Our Reach Across the Continent
countries.subtitle: We have successfully placed students from these countries into top Belarusian universities

about.title: Your Trusted Partner in Belarusian Education
about.description: Belarus Study Bridge is a premier educational consultancy dedicated to connecting ambitious African students with world-class education opportunities in Belarus. We understand the unique challenges international students face and provide end-to-end support.
about.feature1Desc: Official representatives of major Belarusian universities
about.feature2Desc: From admission to graduation, we're with you every step
about.feature3Desc: Quality European education at fraction of Western costs

universities.title: Top Universities in Belarus
universities.subtitle: We partner with the most prestigious universities offering programs in English, Russian, and Belarusian

services.title: Comprehensive Student Services
services.subtitle: We handle everything so you can focus on your education
services.admissionDesc: Complete university application support, document preparation, and admission letter acquisition.
services.visaDesc: Expert guidance on Belarus student visa requirements, documentation, and interview preparation.
services.travelDesc: Airport pickup, accommodation arrangement, and city orientation upon arrival in Belarus.
services.accommodationDesc: University hostel placement or private apartment assistance with affordable options.
services.languageDesc: Pre-departure Russian language courses and ongoing academic support during studies.
services.medicalDesc: Mandatory health insurance setup and guidance on medical facilities in Belarus.
services.residencyDesc: Complete support for temporary residency registration and renewal processes.
services.careerDesc: Internship placements, licensing exam prep (USMLE, PLAB), and career counseling.

process.title: Your Journey to Belarus
process.subtitle: Simple 6-step process from consultation to classroom
process.step1Desc: Free counseling session to discuss your goals and options
process.step2Desc: We help gather and certify all required documents
process.step3Desc: Submit to university and receive admission letter
process.step4Desc: Invitation letter and visa application support
process.step5Desc: Flight booking and airport pickup arrangement

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of African students already studying in Belarus. Get your free consultation today.

footer.brandDesc: Your trusted partner for studying in Belarus. We make international education accessible to African students.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Belarus Study Bridge. All rights reserved.

application.fillDetails: Fill in your details and we'll contact you within 24 hours
application.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your academic goals...
application.successMessage: We'll contact you within 24 hours via WhatsApp or email.
application.secure: Your information is secure and will never be shared with third parties.
